bots.name: Hierophant of Destruction (Multi-Client)
bots.author: Ratul
bots.description:
Black Lagoon **Hierophant of Destruction** 2+ player sigil farmer (multi-client).
Run with **all clients together** and **p1 directly on top of the sigil**.
p1 is the hitter and last in combat. Handles enter, fight, and exit; buys and
uses potions, and grabs wisps if they are present.
Relies on `tp closestmob`; if you are not within range, add a teleport inside the `combat` block.

bots.name: Hierophant of Destruction (Single-Client)
bots.author: Ratul
bots.description:
Black Lagoon **Hierophant of Destruction** sigil farmer (single-client).
Run with **p1 directly on top of the sigil**. Handles enter, fight, and exit;
buys and uses potions, and grabs wisps if they are present.
Relies on `tp closestmob`; if you are not within range, add a teleport inside the `combat` block.
